treatment_information.treatment_response: Did not indicate bleeding or cause of pain

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for suspected gastrointestinal bleeding and abdominal pain
Sigmoidoscopy performed; did not indicate bleeding or cause of pain
Patient discharged with improvement in pain and no bleeding from rectum
Started on antibiotics to treat prostatitis

patient_outcome.final_status: Improved abdominal pain and no rectal bleeding
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with primary doctor once discharged from rehabilitation facility
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Mental Status: Alert and interactive. Activity Status: Out of Bed with assistance to chair or wheelchair.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient did not have any episodes of bleeding during admission
